executive_summary.verdict: ASML = Monopoly in EUV lithography. קרוב ל-GF Value אבל premium ענק ל-DCF/Lynch.
executive_summary.key_insight: Price $1070 vs GF Value $1052 = Fair! But DCF $385 = 178% premium. Monopoly commands premium.

graham.recommendation: ❌ 6x premium - Graham doesn't work for asset-light tech

peter_lynch.historical_trend: Lynch grew from $223 to $640 (3x) as earnings exploded

dcf.historical_trend: DCF grew from $125 to $385 (3x) - strong FCF growth

gf_value.recommendation: ✅ 2% premium - essentially fair value by GF

monopoly_moat.euv_lithography: ASML is the ONLY company that can make EUV machines
monopoly_moat.customers: TSMC, Samsung, Intel ALL depend on ASML
monopoly_moat.barriers: 20+ years of R&D, Carl Zeiss optics partnership
monopoly_moat.pricing_power: EUV machines cost $150-350M each. Customers have no alternative.

risk_factors.china_restrictions: US export controls limit China sales

bull_case.thesis: AI boom drives insatiable chip demand. ASML is the toll booth.

bear_case.thesis: Semiconductor cycle downturn. China restrictions hurt.

growth_investor.reason: Monopoly moat but priced for perfection.

quality_investor.reason: Best-in-class company but near fair value.

key_differentiator: Monopoly commands premium. Near GF Value = fair. Don't expect huge upside.
